title: SPARC Cat - Sham Control Chronic Cat 1 Day 30
author: Brett Hanzlicek
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bfztjp6n
materials: Transport cat from housing site to surgery site.
Cleveland Clinic animal team euthanizes the animal

steps.title: Animal is anesthetized and abdomen is...
steps.instruction: Animal is anesthetized and abdomen is shaved by the vet team. The cat is then moved into the surgery room and attached to monitors by the vet team.

steps.title: Drape animal and perform betadine scrub on abdomen and genitals
steps.instruction: Drape animal and perform betadine scrub on abdomen and genitals.

steps.title: Put surgilube on 3
steps.instruction: Put surgilube on 3.5Fr catheter and insert into bladder through the urethra. Advance the catheter until resistance is met, then pull back 2-3cm.

steps.title: Use gentle suction with syringe to...
steps.instruction: Use gentle suction with syringe to withdraw urine from bladder through the catheter. Measure the volume and save the urine for urinalysis. 15 mL urine removed

steps.title: Use 1:5 dilution of contrast to saline to visualize bladder
steps.instruction: Use 1:5 dilution of contrast to saline to visualize bladder. Fill the bladder with 10 mL contrast and take a single CT image. Add 10 mL more to bladder (total of 20ml) and take single CT image Add 10 mL more to bladder (total of 30ml) and take single CT image Take a 3D CT image with 30ml contrast:saline in the bladder

steps.title: Performed after cat is transferred from Isoflurane to propofol anesthetic
steps.instruction: Performed after cat is transferred from Isoflurane to propofol anesthetic. Fill rate is 2ml saline/minute using syringe pump. Data is recorded using Labview software. Pressure is recorded using an external pressure transducer connected to syringe pump on one end and tubing that leads to the catheter on the other end.

steps.title: Fill bladder with saline and record...
steps.instruction: Fill bladder with saline and record pressure using pressure transducer connected to LabView Fill to 13.9 mL ; Peak pressure around 20 cmH 2 O Fill to 20 mL ; Peak pressure around 34 cmH 2 O Tug on catheter after filling to visualize contraction in Labview software

steps.title: Fill to 15 mL ; End...
steps.instruction: Fill to 15 mL ; End round 2 urodynamics Appears bladder capacity is around 15-20 ml

steps.title: Bladder is removed, examined and placed...
steps.instruction: Bladder is removed, examined and placed in formalin for histological analysis
